results.title: 01 four attached car sheets follow moving seams
results.prompt: REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Tina, blue hoodie, rear seat, and dark sedan. Image 2 locks the real-car / miniature-neighborhood scale and tiny lychee-helper scale. Images 3 and 4 lock flexible car-skin material and its eventual canopy continuity. INVARIANTS — Wheelbase, pillars, floor, rear seat, and Tina remain coherent and grounded. SUBSTRATE — Only the painted roof and upper door skin changes. INITIAL STATE — Blue-gray, rigid, flush with the car. APPLIED FORCE — Four teams of tiny lychee helpers pull four glowing sugar seams rearward; every helper's hands grip a seam, never a panel. TOPOLOGY — Exactly four broad continuous sheets; each begins as part of the roof/upper doors and remains attached along one lower outer edge. No sheet originates above the car. STATE CHANGE — Immediately behind each moving seam, rigid blue-gray surface becomes thin flexible pearly-pink edible membrane and rotates upward around its still-attached edge. SHOT PROOF — Wide passenger-side three-quarter at the instant all four moving boundaries are visible: blue rigid surface ahead, pink flexible sheet behind, tiny hands on the seams, Tina delighted inside. LITERALIZATION HAZARDS / VETO — no flower, petals, leaves, wings, botanical forms, freestanding canopy, convertible mechanism, torn metal, giant hand.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, not a collage or design sheet. Obey the countable mechanical specification before making the frame pretty. Keep one causal action readable through physical contact, tension, attached edges, and a visible active boundary. Preserve declared reference authorities. No captions, labels, watermarks, invented packaging, gore, weapons, generic gummy bears, generic magical glow, or unexplained finished transformations.

results.title: 02 meg tensions one component rail
results.prompt: REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Raul, Meg, and wardrobe. Image 2 locks daylight top bleachers. Image 3 locks dense mango-flesh armor and graphite joints. Image 4 locks mango helpers. INVARIANTS — Raul's real face is uncovered; normal clothes remain visible on unarmored areas. SUBSTRATE — One pre-shaped dense mango-flesh shoulder plate, separate from Raul. INITIAL STATE — The plate rests on the bleacher seat three feet to Raul's right. APPLIED FORCE — Meg leans back with both feet planted and pulls one long amber edible strip taut; its far end passes through a visible loop on the plate. Four mango helpers push the plate from behind. TOPOLOGY — The strip, plate loop, helpers, and open graphite shoulder socket form one uninterrupted straight line. No other strings or floating components. STATE CHANGE — The plate slides along the aluminum row toward the empty shoulder socket; half the distance remains, making assembly incomplete and obvious. SHOT PROOF — Low open daylight wide along the row, Meg at right under tension, Raul at left, moving plate centered between them, every contact point visible. LITERALIZATION HAZARDS / VETO — no flower, wings, lighthouse, beam, fishing rod, grape-character chain, giant fruit behind Raul, finished suit, floating plate, bodybuilder anatomy.

results.title: 03 five helpers carry one open elbow gap
results.prompt: REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Raul and Meg. Image 2 locks daylight top bleachers. Image 3 locks the opaque mango-flesh suit and graphite under-frame. Image 4 exactly locks mango helpers. INVARIANTS — Raul's real uncovered face and a credible narrow mechanical silhouette. SUBSTRATE — The upper-arm and forearm mango plates on Raul's bent right arm. INITIAL STATE — They are separated by one clean eight-inch gap; the graphite elbow connector has not arrived yet. APPLIED FORCE — Exactly five mango helpers form one straight horizontal chain across that gap. The first grips a metal loop on the upper-arm plate, each middle helper grips the next helper's hands, and the fifth grips a loop on the forearm plate. Their bodies stretch under the forearm's weight. TOPOLOGY — One gap, two loops, five helpers, four hand-to-hand links. No helpers anywhere else on the armor. The forearm hangs slightly lower, proving the chain carries load. STATE CHANGE — One small graphite connector approaches the gap from above but has not locked. SHOT PROOF — Daylight medium close profile of the bent arm occupying half the frame, with Raul and Meg's engaged faces visible behind it and every link large enough to read. LITERALIZATION HAZARDS / VETO — no decorative garland, necklace, grape characters, helper crowd, complete elbow joint, helpers sitting on armor, bodybuilder suit, plastic surface, crushing or pain.
